modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Why should I choose Google Docs for my work?

full_description_text:  
So, I’m trying to figure out why I should even use Google Docs. I mean, what can it really do for me? I’ve heard some things, but I’m not sure if it’s worth it for my work. Can someone explain what makes Google Docs special?
short_description: Why should I choose Google Docs for my work?
